# defectdojo_product_member (Resource)

DefectDojo Product Member

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_product_member" "example" {
  product = 1
  user    = 1
  role    = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product` (Number) The ID of the Product
- `role` (Number) The role ID for this product membership
- `user` (Number) The ID of the User

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier
